name: Little Canada Mini Mission: Easter Egg Search
description:
Take on our playful seek‑and‑find with 35 colourful mini eggs and one golden bunny hidden throughout the miniature worlds. It's an indoor, all‑ages experience full of delightful details, moving scenes, and wonder-filled Canadian moments. 

This hunt is less about chocolate overload and more about adventure and discovery, giving kids a fun mission while offering parents a sugar‑free activity everyone can enjoy.

Please remember the mini eggs are to be discovered with your eyes, not your hands, so others can enjoy the fun.
